page_title: Georgi Christov, Lead iOS and Android Engineer
hello_summary: I am a Tech Lead and Engineering Leader with a proven track record of scaling high-impact mobile platforms at enterprise and startup levels. Expert in navigating complex architectural transitions, cross-functional roadmap prioritization, and mentoring engineering teams. Passionate about bridging the gap between business strategy and technical excellence to drive revenue and user adoption.
resume_summary: I have taken on various projects in the past few years the largest ones so far being Everlog (workout tracker app) and GraffiTab (social network for digital artists), where I am the founder, iOS and Android engineer and server-side architect.
resume_employment_monzo_tech_lead_summar:
• Strategic Roadmap & Prioritization: Partnered with leadership to pivot the team’s focus following a 33% headcount reduction, successfully renegotiating 4 parallel workstreams into 2 high-impact initiatives to ensure core delivery.
• Team Development & Domain Expertise: Eliminated critical knowledge silos by mentoring junior engineers in domain-specific lending logic; coached a team member to independently ship an initiative projected to deliver a 30% uplift in product revenue.
resume_employment_monzo_position: Senior Android Engineer | Business Borrowing | ex-Cashback, ex-Flex
resume_employment_monzo_summary:
• Architectural Stewardship: Led the architectural design of a scalable "product renewal" journey, decomposing the implementation to provide stretch opportunities for team members, resulting in a maintainable system and measurable growth in engineering capabilities.
• Cross-Functional Product Impact: Spearheaded the integration of the overdraft product into the business sign-up journey, driving a 250% increase in adoption by navigating complex alignment between cross-departmental stakeholders.
• Foundational Engineering: Contributed to the "Zero-to-One" development of Monzo Flex and Cashback, scaling systems from initial prototypes into established, multi-team platforms supporting international expansion.
resume_employment_fieldmargin_summary:
• Architectural Authority & Standardization: Served as the technical lead, defining all engineering standards, CI/CD practices, and architectural patterns to ensure long-term maintainability and platform stability.
• Offline-First Data Resiliency: Engineered a robust client-server synchronization engine to manage data consistency in connection-less environments; solved complex conflict-resolution scenarios to ensure 100% data integrity for remote agricultural operations.
• Cross-Platform Architectural Vision (POC): Developed the Proof-of-Concept for the "Field Health" mapping feature; established the core rendering and caching logic which served as the architectural blueprint for the iOS implementation.
• Talent Acquisition & Mentorship: Defined the engineering roadmap and facilitated team growth by hiring and mentoring an additional Android engineer to ensure a successful transition of ownership.
resume_employment_qumu_summary:
• Platform Migration & Expansion: Led the native migration of the Qumu enterprise video platform from a browser-based experience to iOS, enabling seamless live and on-demand content streaming with integrated interactive features.
• Scalable Architecture (White-Labeling): Architected a modular, white-labeled mobile framework that allowed the core video engine to be rapidly deployed across multiple enterprise clients with custom branding and authentication flows.
• Enterprise-Grade Performance: Optimized the video playback and rendering logic to meet stringent performance requirements of enterprise clients, ensuring consistent content delivery across diverse network conditions.
resume_employment_futurist_summary: • Versatile Technical Execution: Delivered a high-velocity portfolio of native mobile applications across diverse domains, including medical imaging and interactive gaming.
resume_employment_proxiad_summary:
• Reusable SDK Development: Engineered a shared content-viewer SDK that powered the digital magazine presence for multiple enterprise clients, enabling offline accessibility via a high-performance local HTML rendering engine.
• Best-Practice Foundations: Applied mobile engineering best practices, focusing on code modularity, resource management, and optimized user experience across a wide breadth of technical projects.
resume_employment_ibm_summary: • Academic-to-Industry Transition: Applied rigorous research methodologies from MSci thesis work to solve real-world hardware constraints, resulting in a functional, pioneering remote-control solution.
resume_employment_ibm_2_summary: • Pioneering Systems Integration: Developed a Proof-of-Concept for remote control interoperability between iPads and PCs; architected a bi-directional remote-control framework for Android, utilizing proprietary hardware hooks for cross-platform device management.
resume_employment_uni_position: Tutor at the School of Computing Science
resume_employment_uni_summary: • Assisted and provided guidance to first-year students during their computing science lab tutorials.
resume_education_glasgow_degree: Masters Degree in Mobile Software Engineering (Focus on iOS and Android)
resume_education_glasgow_extra:
• MSci Thesis: ”Introducing the power of enterprise endpoint management to mobile devices”
• Won 1st place at the annual Novice Computer Programming Contest, 2009
portfolio_monzo_description:
Role: Senior Android Engineer

• Brings together all your financial tools in your pocket with one easy-to-use app
• Receive notifications about transactions in real time
• Secure with FSCS protection
portfolio_everlog_description:
Role: Founder, iOS and Android Engineer

• Track, plan and organize workout schedules
• Almost hands-free interaction during gym sessions
• Sync routines and history accross multiple devices
portfolio_graffitab_title: GraffiTab - Social Network for Digital Artists
portfolio_graffitab_description:
Role: Founder, iOS and Android Engineer

• Connect with digital artists worldwide
• Mini Photoshop allows for an optimised digital drawing experience with lower level UI rendering using OpenGL
• Artists can be follow and be followed as well as manage their posts
portfolio_codinglove_title: TheCodingLove - Slack App for Developer GIFs
portfolio_codinglove_description:
Role: Partner and Slack App Engineer

• Slack app for searching through thecodinglove.com's catalog of humorous developer GIFs
• Pictures can be shared in any Slack channel
• Self-destruct mode keeps the channels clean
• Content scraper searches through available pictures
portfolio_fieldmargin_description:
Role: Lead Android Engineer

• Allows farmers to have full access to their farm records from their pocket
• Supports offline mode and syncs data when device is online
• Built on top of Google services (Firebase, Maps) with lots of customisation
portfolio_qumu_description:
Role: Lead iOS Engineer

• Allows enterprise videos to be broadcast in a secure cloud environment
• Viewer and Creator apps replicate website functionality for setting up Live and VOD video streams
• Advanced polls, comments and Q&A features make the app stand out from similar apps in the category
portfolio_massalert_description:
Role: iOS Engineer and Consultant

• App schedules and receives alerts based on channels setup by admin users
• Users can be join or leave channels or be invited
• Alerts are sent as push notifications making them highly reliable
portfolio_tabex_title: Tabex - App to Help You Quit Smoking
portfolio_tabex_description:
Role: Android Engineer

• Developed in partnership with Sopharma
• Keeps track of a schedule for taking Tabex anti-smoking pills
• Sends reminders when next pill should be taken
• Gamification features allow users to stick to their schedule and compete against eachother
portfolio_mentalist_description:
Role: Android Engineer

• The first escape room complex in Bulgaria
• Admins can setup escape toom games remotely and deploy them to mobile devices held by room facilitators
• Apps can download new content and update themselves as well as start/stop games
portfolio_getti_description:
Role: iOS Engineer

• Apps display a digital version of a physical getti card which a user posesses
• Available stores where the card can be used are listed along with any available discounts and codes
portfolio_larctest_description:
Role: iOS and Android Engineer

• Keep track of owned horses
• Enter vitals for each animal after training and receive performance statistics
• Statistics are analysed to provide easy to understand charts and graphs
portfolio_tbob_title: The Best of Bulgaria - Showcase App
portfolio_tbob_description:
Role: iOS and Android Engineer

• Shows interesting facts and traditions about Bulgaria
• Content is split into sections
• Full offline support
recommendations_mark_text: Georgi is a very talented mobile developer with a great eye for design and business practicality. Not only does he have strong technical skills, he can also articulate himself very well and be in direct contact with clients which is a very valuable asset. He is a great addition to any team.
recommendations_guillermo_position: Managing Consultant and Engineering Lead at IBM
recommendations_guillermo_text: Georgi is a great developer. He has an impressive knowledge of Mobile Software Development that is difficult to match. His main roles in IBM have been not only porting management products from Desktop computers to both iOS and Android, but also from iOS to Android; and the results have always exceeded expectations.
recommendations_jose_text: Georgi has a breadth of knowledge in mobile software development and is able to take on complex challenges very quickly and with a lot of drive and passion for learning new things. He is also enjoyable to work with in a development team.
recommendations_radoslav_text: I interviewed Georgi for our internship program. He showed me quickly his good knowledge in all areas we were interested in. So I took the obvious and easy decision to invite him to join my team. He is very enthusiastic and positive person and at the same time very responsible. I definitely could rely on him for every assigned task.
recommendations_ilija_text: I was very impressed by Georgi's professional work done in mobile software development area for such young programmer. Nice and clear user interface, interesting ideas and optimistic thinking. He will always be welcome to work with us in our offices in USA and Bulgaria.
publications_1_title: Studying Digital Graffiti as a Location-Based Social Network
publications_1_description:
• Co-writer & iOS Engineer of DigiGraff
• Explores how users incorporate both utilitarian and playful aspects of location into their social media creation with a two week long study
• In proceedings of ACM CHI 2014 (Toronto, Canada) ACM Press (2014)
publications_2_title: DigiGraff: considering graffiti as a location based social network
publications_2_description:
• Co-writer & iOS Engineer of DigiGraff
• DigiGraff is a social networking app that considers location as a primary rather than secondary aspect of social media and uses virtual sketches as a way of communication and information sharing between users
• Proceeding CHI EA ’12 CHI ’12 Extended Abstracts on Human Factors in Computing Systems Pages 2591-2596
